text.title: Refactor Baseline Metrics Script Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Script imports radon/lizard; reviewers cannot rerun on a clean checkout.
antipattern.fix: Rewrite using ast + git stdlib; or vendor the metric impl.

antipattern.symptom: Base branch run uses 180d window, refactor branch uses 30d window.
antipattern.fix: Read window from a config file pinned to the PR.

antipattern.symptom: Running script twice produces different test_runtime_sec (CI noise) without normalisation.
antipattern.root-cause: deterministic-output not enforced for time-dependent metrics.
antipattern.fix: Average over N runs; record min/max; or capture from CI artefact rather than live.
